qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Create DAG API allows arbitrary file creation outside the DAG root
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: It reaches the same advisory-described POST /api/v1/dags -> CreateNewDAG -> Storage.Create -> generateFilePath path. The report's blank-spec and absolute-path variant is a narrower exploit of the same missing DAG-name validation and out-of-root path resolution root cause.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Viewer-readable DAG APIs disclose secret-bearing workflow configuration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns lower-privilege read APIs returning secret-bearing DAG data. The advisory is a DAG-creation path traversal write flaw in CreateNewDAG and filedag.generateFilePath, so the vulnerable code and root cause are different.

selected_finding.title: Create DAG API allows arbitrary file creation outside the DAG root

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the advisory's vulnerable code path: CreateNewDAG accepts a path-like DAG name without ValidateDAGName and passes it into Storage.Create, where generateFilePath resolves separator-bearing names outside the DAG base directory. The copied PoC then reproduced out-of-root file creation at an attacker-chosen path.
evidence: The vulnerable commit's CreateNewDAG handler has no ValidateDAGName call, while the fixing commit adds that check before the spec/default-spec branches.

The vulnerable commit's internal/persis/filedag/store.go generateFilePath returns filepath.Abs(name) when the name contains a path separator, and Storage.Create writes the resulting path with os.WriteFile.

The copied PoC run under .judge/poc_runs/dag-api-arbitrary-file-write/run.log printed EVOHUNT_PROOF: developer-created file outside the DAG root and EVOHUNT_PROOF_FILE: /tmp/evohunt-vuln-commit-proof, confirming a file was created outside the configured DAG directory.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC authenticated as a developer, submitted POST /api/v1/dags with an absolute-path name, and run.log confirmed /tmp/evohunt-vuln-commit-proof was created outside the DAG root with the expected default DAG content.
